edge_mask_definition: source train true-velocity gradient threshold, strict > tau_source_90 for source-threshold audit; training loss uses true target quantile edge mask per batch as PASD v0.2
gradient_metric_definition: physical velocity gradients after inverse transform; dx=dz=1 grid_cell; report gradient_l1_all, gradient_l1_edge, gradient_magnitude_MAE, direction cosine error
